title: Thāna Bhawan Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Thāna Bhawan with a Z-Score of +5.06. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Thāna Bhawan is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 16.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 27%, and the wind speed is 11.2 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 These conditions are expected to continue, posing significant risks to the local population and infrastructure.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the heat wave's effects immediately.
